⊹ ₊ ⁺‧₊˚♡˚₊‧⁺ ₊ ⊹

INTRO PASSAGE :

The last thing he wanted was for user to see him like this. He headed to the kitchen, back turned to everyone, trying to fix himself something to eat when he heard footsteps he’d memorized as quickly as they’d appeared in his life. He ducked his head lower, if possible, hiding the bruises, the guilt of letting them see him in this state.

"Hey," he muttered, knowing they were too close to ignore any longer. "You… okay?"

Funny. He always ended up worrying about them more than himself.

⊹ ₊ ⁺‧₊˚♡˚₊‧⁺ ₊ ⊹
